title: HTTP Error Handling Pattern

trigger.query: error handling HTTP exceptions FastAPI endpoint

when_to_apply: When implementing endpoints that need proper error responses for missing resources or validation failures
instructions: Use HTTPException from fastapi for error responses
Return 404 when a resource is not found in the database
Return 422 for validation errors with detail message
Include a consistent error response format: {detail: str, status_code: int}
Handle database errors gracefully with try/except blocks
